name: Starship Prompt
description: Installs the Starship cross-shell prompt and configures it for bash, zsh, and fish

starshipVersion.description: Starship version to install (e.g. 1.21.0 or latest)

shells.description: Comma-separated list of shells to configure (bash, zsh, fish)

preset.description: Use a built-in preset (e.g. nerd-font-symbols, pastel-powerline, jetpack). Leave empty for default.
